textContent:
Mejo na-shook ako nung class na to kasi andaming nangyayari at the same time. Una, kakagaling ko lang from a meeting so I basically had to run to catch the class. Second, yung friend/crush ko nanakawan tapos he was having a breakdown and I was trying to help him during class. 

Aside from that muna, yung mga na-partner ko naman good kasi mga physics students pala sila! Madalas when I tell people na physics student aq nasu-shook sila pero sila they were like omg kami rin! Nag-share lang ako ng tips sa kanila on how to get into the lab that they want (D&C and Gravity group) kasi nag-apply or alam ko yung proseso ng application dun. Pero nawawala-wala ako sa conversation nila kasi nga tinutulungan ko yung friend kong nanakawan ng pera. Okay naman yung walk, stressed lang talaga ako kasi sa sitwasyon ng friend ko.
title: Mar 30
textContentHtml:
Mejo na-shook ako nung class na to kasi andaming nangyayari at the same time. Una, kakagaling ko lang from a meeting so I basically had to run to catch the class. Second, yung friend/crush ko nanakawan tapos he was having a breakdown and I was trying to help him during class. 


Aside from that muna, yung mga na-partner ko naman good kasi mga physics students pala sila! Madalas when I tell people na physics student aq nasu-shook sila pero sila they were like omg kami rin! Nag-share lang ako ng tips sa kanila on how to get into the lab that they want (D&C and Gravity group) kasi nag-apply or alam ko yung proseso ng application dun. Pero nawawala-wala ako sa conversation nila kasi nga tinutulungan ko yung friend kong nanakawan ng pera. Okay naman yung walk, stressed lang talaga ako kasi sa sitwasyon ng friend ko.
